# Test Cases — Ladder Mechanic
**Generated from**: design/GDD-FEATURE-ladder-mechanic.md (v1, hash: 248FDEE59877405709C2B556BD4DEFD2)
**Generated by**: agent_qc (Verita)
**Date**: 2026-03-18

---

## Core Mechanics (GDD §2)

### TC-L001: Diamond accumulation on Ladder tile
- **Given** player.diamond = 0
- **When** token lands on Ladder tile (IDs: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40)
- **Then** player.diamond += diamond_per_ladder_tile (default 50)

### TC-L002: Gate opens when diamond >= 600 and token lands on Safe Zone
- **Given** player.diamond = 600, player.gateOpen = false
- **When** token lands on Safe Zone tile (IDs: 1, 11, 21, 31 matching player color)
- **Then** player.gateOpen = true, token enters Ladder Lane

### TC-L003: Gate does NOT open at diamond = 599 on Safe Zone
- **Given** player.diamond = 599, player.gateOpen = false
- **When** token lands on Safe Zone tile
- **Then** player.gateOpen remains false

### TC-L004: Gate does NOT open when diamond >= 600 but non-Safe Zone tile
- **Given** player.diamond = 620, player.gateOpen = false
- **When** token lands on any non-Safe Zone tile
- **Then** player.gateOpen remains false

### TC-L005: Token navigates Ladder Lane when gate is open
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, token on outer track adjacent to Ladder Lane entrance
- **When** player rolls dice
- **Then** token enters Ladder Lane (tiles 41-44) instead of continuing outer track

### TC-L006: Win triggered on correct Ladder Final tile
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, player.color = Green, token on Ladder Lane
- **When** token lands on tile 41 (Green Ladder Final)
- **Then** triggerWin(playerId), game ends

### TC-L007: Win NOT triggered on wrong color Ladder Final tile
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, player.color = Green, token on tile 43 (Blue Ladder Final)
- **When** token lands on tile 43
- **Then** no win triggered, token stays on tile

---

## Edge Cases (GDD §4)

### TC-L008: Concurrent gate opening (2 players same round)
- **Given** playerA.diamond = 600, playerB.diamond = 600, both on Safe Zones
- **When** both players' turns resolve in same round
- **Then** both playerA.gateOpen = true and playerB.gateOpen = true; both enter Ladder Lane competition

### TC-L009: Token pushed back but gate stays open
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, token on Ladder Lane or Safe Zone
- **When** another player's action pushes token back to outer track
- **Then** player.gateOpen remains true; token can re-enter Ladder Lane on next Safe Zone visit

### TC-L010: Overshoot bounce back on Ladder Lane
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, token on tile 42 (Red Ladder), player color = Green (target = 41)
- **When** dice roll = 10 (overshoots tile 41 and passes tile 44)
- **Then** token bounces back to tile 42 position; requires exact roll to reach tile 41

### TC-L011: Diamond threshold exactly 600
- **Given** player.diamond = 599
- **When** player lands on Ladder tile earning 50 diamond
- **Then** player.diamond = 649 (not capped at 600); gate can open on next Safe Zone visit

### TC-L012: Reaching Ladder Final after opponent already won
- **Given** game.winner is set (another player won), player.gateOpen = true
- **When** token reaches correct Ladder Final tile (41-44)
- **Then** no win triggered (game already over)

---

## Win Conditions (GDD §3)

### TC-L013: First player to Ladder Final wins
- **Given** 4 players in game, no winner yet
- **When** player A reaches their Ladder Final tile with gateOpen = true
- **Then** player A wins, game state = finished

### TC-L014: Only one winner per game
- **Given** player A just won, player B has gateOpen = true on Ladder Lane
- **When** player B attempts to reach Ladder Final
- **Then** no win, game already ended

---

## Test Scenarios (GDD §9)

### TC-L015: Full ladder journey — 600 diamond to win
- **Given** player.diamond = 550, gateOpen = false
- **When** player lands on Ladder tile (+50 = 600), then on Safe Zone (gate opens), then navigates Ladder Lane to correct Ladder Final
- **Then** triggerWin(playerId) fires

### TC-L016: Insufficient diamond on Safe Zone
- **Given** player.diamond = 599
- **When** player lands on Safe Zone
- **Then** gateOpen remains false; player continues outer track

### TC-L017: Diamond but wrong tile
- **Given** player.diamond = 620
- **When** player lands on non-Safe Zone tile
- **Then** gateOpen remains false; must wait for Safe Zone

### TC-L018: Gate persists after pushback
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, token on Safe Zone
- **When** opponent pushes token back
- **Then** gateOpen remains true

### TC-L019: Wrong Ladder Final color
- **Given** player.gateOpen = true, player.color = Green
- **When** token lands on tile 43 (Blue Ladder Final)
- **Then** no win; must reach tile 41

---

## Balance & Configuration Tests (GDD §6)

### TC-L020: Diamond accumulation rate
- **Given** diamond_per_ladder_tile = 50
- **When** player lands on Ladder tiles 12 times
- **Then** player.diamond = 600 (exact threshold)

### TC-L021: Extra turn on doubles
- **Given** player.extraTurnUsed = false, extra_turn_on_doubles = true
- **When** player rolls doubles
- **Then** player gets an extra turn

### TC-L022: Extra turn not granted twice
- **Given** player.extraTurnUsed = true
- **When** player rolls doubles again
- **Then** no extra turn granted

---
